question: Threat Awareness and Reporting Program (TARP)
canonical_answer: An Army regulation providing policy and responsibilities for threat awareness and education and establishes a requirement for Dept. of Army personnel to report any incident of known or suspected espionage, int'l terrorism, sabotage, subversion, theft or diversion of mil. tech., info. systems intrusions, and unauthorized disclosure of classified information
